channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What video got Kash Patel in the headlines this week? The quiz knows
item.description: Plus: The Met Gala, GameStop, Canada and Banksy (again!).

item.title: UAE reports drone and missile attack as Iran war ceasefire is challenged
item.description: The Iran war's shaky ceasefire was further strained on Friday as the United Arab Emirates responded to a missile and drone strikes.

item.title: Prices are up, but Mother's Day still means brunch
item.description: It's the biggest day for America's restaurants, and one of the biggest for flower sales. Despite anxieties over rising gas prices, people are ready to...

item.title: Military drills on the edge: U.S. and allies test capabilities near Asia's flash points
item.description: From drone boats to long-range missiles, the U.S. and its allies tested new military tactics in the Philippines, sharpening deterrence as tensions wit...
